title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/08/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures fluctuated rangebound, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 793, down 0.25% for the day.Traders sold goods according to market conditions, while steel mills purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average. In the Shandong region, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 775-776 yuan/mt, basically flat compared to yesterday's prices.
